---
id: get-feature-usages-registry-features-feature-id-usages-get
title: "Get usages of a feature"
description: "Return all definitions that depend on the given feature."
sidebar_label: "Get usages of a feature"
hide_title: true
hide_table_of_contents: true
api:

import MethodEndpoint from "@theme/ApiExplorer/MethodEndpoint";
import ParamsDetails from "@theme/ParamsDetails";
import RequestSchema from "@theme/RequestSchema";
import StatusCodes from "@theme/StatusCodes";
import OperationTabs from "@theme/OperationTabs";
import TabItem from "@theme/TabItem";

import Translate from "@docusaurus/Translate";

<Heading
  as=&#123;"h1"&#125;
  className=&#123;"openapi__heading"&#125;
  children=&#123;"Get usages of a feature"&#125;
>
</Heading>

<MethodEndpoint
  method=&#123;"get"&#125;
  path=&#123;"/registry/features/&#123;feature_id&#125;/usages"&#125;
  context=&#123;"endpoint"&#125;
>
  
</MethodEndpoint>



Return all definitions that depend on the given feature.

Each usage entry contains definition_id, version, and definition_type
of the consuming definition.

HTTP 404 — feature not found.

  id=&#123;"request"&#125;
  as=&#123;"h2"&#125;
  className=&#123;"openapi-tabs__heading"&#125;
>
  <Translate id="theme.openapi.request.title">Request</Translate>
</Heading>
